hotels.name: NAIA Terminal 3 Condo Newport with WIFI Netflix Pool
hotels.description_fr:
Offrant une vue sur le jardin, l’établissement NAIA Terminal 3 Condo Newport with WIFI Netflix Pool se situe à Manille, dans ce quartier : Pasay. Il possède un jardin et est situé à respectivement 1 km et 4,8 km de ces lieux d’intérêt : Centre commercial Newport Mall et Palais des sports du SM Mall of Asia. Une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite est fournie dans tout l’établissement et un parking privé est disponible sur place.

Chaque hébergement possède une salle de bains privative avec un bidet, la climatisation, une télévision à écran plat et un réfrigérateur. Des serviettes et du linge de lit moyennant des frais supplémentaires.

Un service de location de voitures est assuré sur place.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: NAIA Terminal 3 Condo Newport with WIFI Netflix Pool in Manila offers a spacious apartment with air-conditioning, a private bathroom, and a garden view. The property includes a work desk, sofa bed, and a dining table.
Essential Facilities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a garden, and a pool. Additional amenities include a private check-in and check-out service, a lift, 24-hour front desk, concierge service, minimarket, outdoor seating area, hairdresser/beautician, full-day security, express check-in and check-out, and car hire.
Prime Location: Located less than 1 km from Newport Mall, the apartment is 4.8 km from Mall of Asia Arena and Glorietta Mall.

hotels.name: Discovery Primea
hotels.description_fr:
Centrally located in Makati, Discovery Primea features modern and luxurious accommodation with free WiFi access in the public areas. It houses an outdoor infinity pool, fitness centre, restaurants and free parking on site.
The property is just 400 metres from Glorietta Mall and Makati Stock Exchange. The famous Greenbelt Mall is 500 metres away, while Manila International Airport is accessible within a 6 km drive.
Elegantly furnished, air-conditioned suites come equipped with a personal safe, iPod dock, a flat-screen cable/satellite TV and seating area. Electric kettle and coffee machine are also included. The en suite bathroom has bathtub, shower facility, hairdryer and free toiletries. Bathrobes and ironing amenities are also available.

hotels.name: City Of Dreams - Nüwa Manila
hotels.description_fr:
City of Dreams Manila - Nüwa is a luxurious, 5-star hotel featuring an outdoor pool, restaurant and bar. Offering air-conditioned rooms, studios and suites with free WiFi and city views, the property also has an in-house casino.

City of Dreams Manila - Nüwa is 3.1 km from SM City Mall of Asia and 4.2 km from Ninoy Aquino International Airport. Makati City is 7 km away while Manila Ocean Park is 7.5 km from the hotel.

Cable TV is provided in every air-conditioned room at Open Hearth Lodge. There is also a refrigerator and work desk. Featuring a shower, private bathrooms also come with a bath or shower and a hairdryer.

hotels.name: Stefano's house
hotels.description_fr:
L’hébergement Stefano's house vous accueille dans le centre de Catane, à respectivement 2,7 km et 600 mètres de ces lieux d’intérêt : Plage Lido Arcobaleno et Place du Dôme. Il propose une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Occupant un bâtiment datant de 1960, cette maison de vacances est à respectivement 1 km et 800 mètres de : Château d'Ursino et Roman Theatre of Catania.

Comprenant 1 chambre, cette maison de vacances avec climatisation compte 1 salle de bains avec un bidet, une baignoire ou une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits. Une télévision à écran plat est à votre disposition.

Un petit-déjeuner italien est servi sur place.

Vous séjournerez à proximité de ces lieux d’intérêt : Amphithéâtre romain de Catane, Cathédrale Sant'Agata de Catane et Casa Museo di Giovanni Verga.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Stefano's house in Catania offers a holiday home with one bedroom and one bathroom. The ground-floor unit features tiled floors, air-conditioning, and a private entrance.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, a washing machine, and a fully equipped kitchen with a refrigerator, stovetop, and coffee machine. Additional amenities include a TV, minibar, and free toiletries.
Convenient Location: Located in the city centre, the property is a 6-minute walk from Catania Piazza Duomo and 5 minutes from Catania Cathedral. Nearby attractions include Casa Museo di Giovanni Verga and Ursino Castle.
Dining Experience: An Italian breakfast is served daily, and guests can enjoy a variety of options for food and drinks nearby.
hotels.description_es:

Esta casa o chalet con aire acondicionado consta de 1 dormitorio y 1 baño con bidet, bañera o ducha y artículos de aseo gratuitos. Hay TV de pantalla plana.

En la casa o chalet se puede disfrutar de un desayuno italiano.

Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interés como Anfiteatro grecoromano, Catedral de Catania y Casa museo Giovanni Verga. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Catania - Fontanarossa) está a 7 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicación — Le han puesto un 9,6 para viajes de dos personas.

Cet établissement non-fumeurs vous accueille à 600 mètres de : Place du Dôme.

Tous les hébergements sont pourvus d’une machine à café. Certains hébergements possèdent également une terrasse. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.
hotels.description_en:

Convenient Facilities: Guests benefit from full-day security, luggage storage, and streaming services. Additional amenities include a terrace, sofa bed, work desk, and soundproofing.
Prime Location: Located in the city centre, the guest house is a 6-minute walk from Catania Piazza Duomo and 500 metres from the Amphitheatre. Nearby attractions include Casa Museo di Giovanni Verga and the Roman Theatre of Catania. Catania Fontanarossa Airport is 6 km away.

hotels.description_es:

El alojamiento, construido en 1940, está a 9 min a pie de Roman Theatre of Catania y a 1 km de Castillo de Ursino. Este alojamiento libre de humo está a 6 min a pie de Piazza Duomo.

Las unidades de este alojamiento están equipadas con cafetera. Todas las habitaciones del alojamiento tienen baño privado con bidet y artículos de aseo gratuitos, además de TV de pantalla plana y aire acondicionado. Algunas habitaciones también incluyen terraza. En el hostal o pensión, las habitaciones incluyen ropa de cama y toallas.

Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interés como Anfiteatro grecoromano, Catedral de Catania y Casa museo Giovanni Verga.
hotels.description_pt:

Construído em 1940, o alojamento está a cerca de menos de 1 km de Roman Theatre of Catania e a 12 minutos a pé de Castelo Ursino. Este alojamento não fumador encontra-se a 6 minutos a pé de Piazza Duomo.

Todas as unidades do alojamento estão equipados com máquina de café. Apresentando uma casa de banho privativa dispondo de bidé e produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos, todos os quartos do alojamento têm uma televisão de ecrã plano e ar condicionado, e alguns quartos estão equipados com terraço. hotels.description_it:

Le unità presso questo affittacamere prevedono una macchina da caffè. Provviste di bagno privato con bidet e set di cortesia, tutte le camere presso Palazzo delle Belle hanno la TV a schermo piatto e l’aria condizionata. Alcune camere hanno al loro interno una terrazza. Presso questa struttura, tutte le camere sono provviste di lenzuola e asciugamani.

hotels.name: B&B Sciara Larmisi
hotels.description_fr:
Doté d'une terrasse et offrant une vue sur le jardin, le B&B Sciara Larmisi est situé dans le centre-ville de Catane, à 500 mètres de la Piazza Duomo et à 3 minutes à pied de la Piazza Teatro Massimo.
Les chambres élégantes sont munies d'une télévision à écran plat ainsi que d'une bouilloire. Vous bénéficierez d'une salle de bains privative. Des chaussons et des articles de toilette gratuits sont fournis, pour plus de confort.
Chaque matin, vous dégusterez un petit-déjeuner italien ou continental, qui vous sera servi sur la terrasse, par beau temps. Des produits sans gluten sont disponibles sur demande.
L'établissement assure un service de nettoyage à sec
Le Bed & Breakfast dispense par ailleurs un service de location de vélos et de voitures.
hotels.description_en:
Offering a terrace and views of the garden, B&B Sciara Larmisi is located in the City Centre district in Catania, 500 metres from Piazza Duomo and 3 minutes' walk from Piazza Teatro Massimo.
The elegant rooms have a flat-screen TV. You will find a kettle in the room. Rooms are equipped with a private bathroom. For your comfort, you will find slippers and free toiletries.
Served on the terrace in fine weather, both an Italian and continental-style breakfast are provided daily. Gluten-free products available on request.
There is dry cleaning services at the property.
The bed and breakfast also offers bike hire and car hire. Catania Cathedral is 500 metres from B&B Sciara Larmisi, while the Anfiteatro greco-romano is 800 metres away.
hotels.description_es:
El B&B Sciara Larmisi tiene terraza y vistas al jardín, y se encuentra en el distrito Centro de Catania, a 500 metros de Piazza Duomo y a 3 minutos a pie de Piazza Teatro Massimo.
Las habitaciones son elegantes e incluyen TV de pantalla plana, hervidor de agua y baño privado. Hay artículos de aseo gratuitos y zapatillas.
Se ofrece desayuno continental e italiano diario, y se sirve en la terraza cuando hace buen tiempo. Hay productos sin gluten bajo petición.
El establecimiento ofrece servicio de limpieza en seco.
En este bed and breakfast se pueden alquilar bicicletas y coches.
hotels.description_pt:
O B&B Sciara Larmisi disponibiliza um terraço e vistas para o jardim, bem como está localizado no centro da cidade de Catânia, a 500 metros da Piazza Duomo (praça) e a 3 minutos a pé da Piazza Teatro Massimo (praça).
Os elegantes quartos estão equipados com uma televisão de ecrã plano. Encontrará uma chaleira no quarto. Os quartos incluem uma casa de banho privativa. Para maior conforto, chinelos e produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos são fornecidos.
Um pequeno-almoço italiano e continental são servidos diariamente no terraço quando o tempo está bom. Produtos sem glúten estão disponíveis mediante pedido.
Há serviços de limpeza a seco na propriedade.
Também está disponível um serviço de aluguer de bicicletas e carros.
hotels.description_it:
Dotato di una terrazza con vista sul giardino, il B&B Sciara Larmisi sorge nel centro di Catania, a 500 metri da Piazza Duomo e a 3 minuti a piedi da Piazza Teatro Massimo.
Tutte le eleganti camere della strutura presentano una TV a schermo piatto, un bollitore e un bagno privato con pantofole e set di cortesia.
Ogni mattina vi attende una colazione all'italiana e continentale con prodotti senza glutine su richiesta, servita in terrazza nelle belle giornate.
Come ospiti del bed & breakfast potrete usufruire di un servizio di lavaggio a secco.
